title: RHCSA 10 Lab 02: IPv4 Networking
description: Configure persistent IPv4 networking with NetworkManager

tasks: On client, configure the active lab connection with IPv4 address 192.168.122.45/24.
On client, set gateway 192.168.122.1 and DNS server 192.168.122.3.
On client, ensure the connection uses manual IPv4 configuration and autoconnects.
hints: Use nmcli connection show --active to find the connection.
Modify the connection profile, then bring it up.
checks: connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.45/24'

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3'

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual && nmcli -g connection.autoconnect connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx yes
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: configure the active lab connection with IPv4 address 192.168.122.45/24
ensure the connection uses manual IPv4 configuration and autoconnects
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
